description: Verify completion of AUDIT AUTHORITY LOCK + DEV EXECUTION LOCK implementation and propose next roadmap step: UNIVERSAL EXECUTOR / AUDITOR EXCHANGE LEDGER LOOP. This step establishes the foundational traceable loop through ledger for all executor-auditor exchanges.
routing_decision_basis: Roadmap sequence: step 9 (AUDIT AUTHORITY LOCK + DEV EXECUTION LOCK) completed, proceeding to step 10 (UNIVERSAL EXECUTOR / AUDITOR EXCHANGE LEDGER LOOP)
